mapper.select: select id as id, platform_model_alias as platformModelAlias, scope_type as scopeType, scope_value as scopeValue, effect as effect, active as active, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, reason as reason from model_access_rules order by created_at asc

select id as id, actor_id as actorId, action as action, target_model_alias as targetModelAlias, target_scope_type as targetScopeType, target_scope_value as targetScopeValue, detail as detail, created_at as createdAt from model_access_audit_events order by created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert into model_access_rules ( id, platform_model_alias, scope_type, scope_value, effect, active, created_by, created_at, reason ) values ( #{id}, #{platformModelAlias}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeValue}, #{effect}, #{active}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{reason} ) on conflict (id) do update set platform_model_alias = excluded.platform_model_alias, scope_type = excluded.scope_type, scope_value = excluded.scope_value, effect = excluded.effect, active = excluded.active, created_by = excluded.created_by, created_at = excluded.created_at, reason = excluded.reason
